item.title: Disney Removes All Remnants of Aerosmith from Rock ‘n’ Roller Coaster 1 Day After Ride’s Closure
item.description: The iconic ride at Disney’s Hollywood Studios in Florida is set to be transformed into the Rock ‘n’ Roller Coaster Starring The Muppets

item.title: Demi Moore Steps Out with Her Tiny Chihuahua Pilaf in Milan, Plus Bella Hadid, Jerry Seinfeld, Cillian Murphy and More
item.description: From Milan to New York City, and everywhere in between, see what your favorite stars are up to

item.title: Kelly Clarkson’s Modern Furniture Line Is Up to 79% Off — Save on ‘Rich’-Looking Sofas, Accent Chairs, and Cabinets
item.description: They bring “brightness and warmth” to shoppers’ homes

item.title: Kaley Cuoco Reveals Icy First Encounter with Rose McGowan When She Joined “Charmed”: 'I Still Don't Know If She Liked Me’
item.description: Cuoco spoke to Dax Shepard about her relationship with McGowan on the Feb. 9 episode of his 'Armchair Expert' podcast

item.title: Gwyneth Paltrow Shared How to a Style an Oversized V-Neck Sweater: 'Tuck It in, Roll Up the Sleeves'
item.description: Try the look for yourself with these similar styles at Amazon
